The classification of Loeseneriella zippeliana is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics.

This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, helping to alleviate symptoms of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
